name: USalign
description: Structurally align proteins and nucleic acids. Calculates size independent TM-score heuristic and minimizes it with a heuristic structural alignment algorithm. Has an advantage over RMSD with its higher alignment coverage.
capabilities: Structurally align proteins and nucleic acids
Calculates size independent TM-score heuristic and minimizes it with a heuristic structural alignment algorithm
Has an advantage over RMSD with its higher alignment coverage

structure_1.description: First protein or nucleic acid structure for alignment

structure_2.description: Second protein or nucleic acid structure for alignment
